measurement_classification: single-run video functional diagnostic, not a benchmark

timing_boundaries.preprocess: shared letterbox and RGB NCHW FP32 construction
timing_boundaries.inference: NcnnDetector::infer input bind, Extractor::extract, validation and copy
timing_boundaries.postprocess: shared YOLOv5 decode, threshold, NMS, inverse map and clipping
timing_boundaries.video_write: one cv::VideoWriter::write call; close/flush is separate
timing_boundaries.pipeline_total: preprocess + inference + postprocess; excludes read, visualization and write
timing_boundaries.container_fps_note: 30 FPS is output container playback metadata, not actual processing FPS
